query: heavy fog mist obscured figure barely visible silhouette
message: sub:bad_or_no_details/fog_silhouette — anti_aesthetic — figures lost in mist, dissolved silhouettes, monochrome haze

response.objective_caption: A person holding an umbrella stands on the right side of the frame near a tiered stone structure with a decorative top on the left. The scene is enveloped in dense fog that obscures background details and reduces visibility throughout. The person wears a coat and stands with their back to the camera. The ground appears flat and paved, and the overall setting suggests an outdoor public space.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A person holding an umbrella stands near a tiered stone structure in dense fog. The image displays muted, faded tones with near-monochrome desaturation and extremely low contrast, producing a heavy, oppressive atmosphere with weak separation between light and dark. The obscured visibility and isolated lone figure evoke atmospheric distress, conveying unease and melancholy through the suffocating mist and tonal flatness.
